first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning in the justification, strengths, and concerns sections is substantively the same across both evaluations. The minor differences in wording and emphasis are consistent with normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any change in the assessment of the candidate's skills based on their location.
